text:
Greetings, 

	I have formated the NIS article from Issue #3 of the FreeBSDzine
in the Docbook format.  It would answer both docs/10085 and docs/10098.

	It can be found at:

	http://www.wimmer.net/charles/article.sgml


--
Charles A. Wimmer      o-|charles@wimmer.net|http://www.wimmer.net/charles
